title: Tree Hollows
description: Adrien's edits that add tree hollows to Minecraft
body:
# Tree Hollows

### This is a resource pack that adds tree hollows at random. They have no utilities, beside the nice look.

Each hollowed log variant has a **5%** chance of appearing.

This supports all tree types (Talking from **1.21.5** update).

![Cherry Grove Tree Hollow Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M4Q6WGcr/images/d1f9eaa6ba2875e5f4e29b8f8391ec840503b237.png)

![Azalea Tree Hollow Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M4Q6WGcr/images/ffae43c050432a9efb21cfa3a028c972a6808d41.png)

![Jungle Tree Hollow Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M4Q6WGcr/images/4b09f48d94f51978c2992b85401303d2c27cd337.png)

![Crimson Forest Tree Hollow Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M4Q6WGcr/images/322a17c368b8f87fa59c4ac7fc5ec0361f26fcb1.png)


>**Credits:** This resource pack was inspired by the mod [Tree Hollows](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-hollows), the base texture is from the mod (Acacia, Birch, Dark Oak, Jungle, Oak, Spruce), the rest of the logs (Cherry, Crimson Fungus, Mangrove, Pale Oak, Warped Fungus) are made by me.
